{"cards": [{"name": "Forge of Possibilities", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens with haste.
• Draw two cards, then discard two cards.", "flavor_text": ""Every spark holds infinite potential, waiting for the right moment to ignite."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal red instant that offers flexibility between damage, artifact removal, token creation, and card selection. The 'choose two' format provides significant value at rare while staying within red's color pie. Each mode is appropriately costed for the total mana investment."}, {"name": "The Verdant Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — Creatures you control gain trample until end of turn. Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green Saga that follows a natural progression from land ramp to creature enhancement to a powerful combat payoff. Each chapter builds on the previous one, creating a cohesive narrative of nature's awakening. The final chapter provides significant card advantage while staying in green's wheelhouse."}, {"name": "Crystalline Caverns", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "The walls shimmer with trapped starlight, revealing glimpses of distant futures.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless utility land that provides card selection through scry. The enters-tapped drawback and high activation cost balance the repeatable scry effect. Appropriate power level for uncommon rarity."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Ancient roots run deeper than memory, connecting all living things in an endless web of growth and renewal.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the interconnected nature of forest ecosystems. The flavor emphasizes themes of ancient wisdom and natural connection."}]}
